headline: MGM Resorts Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
summary: MGM Resorts Q1 revenues beats expectations as China and digital strength lift sales, but higher costs and margin pressure push earnings below estimates.

headline: MGM Resorts International Q1 Earnings Call Highlights

headline: MGM Resorts posts record net revenues, Las Vegas uptick in Q1
summary: CEO Bill Hornbuckle said first quarter Sin City performance was driven by solid convention bookings, and voiced optimism for the rest of 2026.

headline: MGM Resorts International (MGM) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Digital and China Drive ...

headline: MGM (MGM) Reports Q1 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
summary: The headline numbers for MGM (MGM) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended March 2026, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.
